Check name:
Memory requests should be set

Problem from trusted Checkov report:
Memory requests should be set

Risk from trusted Checkov report:
Without memory requests, Kubernetes cannot schedule the pod reliably and the workload may cause resource pressure.

Fix from trusted Checkov report:
Add resources.requests.memory to the container.
